name: separator-demo
visual_summary: The Separator Demo is a horizontal divider that can be used to separate sections of content on a page. It's useful when you want to group related items together or create visual hierarchy on your layout. You can customize its appearance by choosing from different styles.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready divider component with the following characteristics:

Name: separator-demo
Description: The Separator Demo is a horizontal divider that can be used to separate sections of content on a page. It's useful when you want to group related items together or create visual hierarchy on your layout. You can customize its appearance by choosing from different styles.
Style: minimal, dark, bordered
Interactions: 
Tags: divider, separator, divider-component

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
